Third-party CC0 / public domain packs in this folder (no F1 official branding).

Poly Haven (CC0) — https://polyhaven.com
  - asphalt_track (2K JPG: diff, nor_gl, rough) — racing asphalt surface
  - clean_asphalt (2K JPG: diff, nor_gl) — alternate tarmac
  - concrete_road_barrier (GLTF 2K + bin + textures) — Jersey-style barrier model
  - autumn_field_puresky (2K HDR) — outdoor sky; copy also under Resources/CC0_Race/Track for runtime sky

ambientCG (CC0) — https://ambientcg.com
  - Rubber004 (2K JPG pack) — tire / rubber surfaces; copies under Resources/CC0_Race/Rubber
  - Grass001 (1K JPG pack) — runoff grass; copies under Resources/CC0_Race/Grass

Kenney (CC0) — https://kenney.nl/assets/racing-kit
  - Racing Kit — low-poly track tiles, fences, flags, pit props, etc. (FBX/OBJ in RacingKit/)

Runtime bundles (Resources):
  - Assets/Resources/CC0_Race/ — Resources.Load: Track (asphalt_track, HDRI), Grass, Rubber, CleanAsphalt, Barrier (concrete jersey textures), Kenney fenceStraight/Curved FBX.
  - TrackRaceDecorPlacer + Race_Controller.buildTracksideDecor spawn fences/barriers/tires along CSV centerline.
